title: The Test of Attention
subtitle: Chapter 01 · Testing Data Contract
introduction: A test moment loads. Focus on the core anomaly.
description: A test moment loads. Focus on the core anomaly.
observation: The target glows briefly, then turns back to calm.
reconstruction: Select the diagnostic key, the timing fragment, and the response note.
attunements: The glowing node deviates from the sequence.
The timing fragment matches the anomaly.
The response note is correctly formulated.

anomaly_definition.misstep_text: Look closely at the center, not the borders.

capture_window.guidance_text: HOLD NOW TO ALIGN THE ATTENTION.

evidence_nodes.relevance: The key aligns with the loader.
The fragment represents the capture window.
